title: Hot Tub Killer Trial: UK court hears how accused hid violent abuse; case fuels debate
summary_full: In a chilling turn of events, a man known only as the 'hot tub killer' faces grave accusations in the UK, revealing a sinister side he kept hidden from friends and loved ones. Once viewed as an ordinary individual, he allegedly duped his entire social circle before tragically murdering his partner.
